test.command: docker compose exec funasr bash -c 'cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/ -x'
test.details: 301 passed, 2 skipped, 33 warnings. Fixed type-narrowing issues in test_jobs.py and test_reprocess.py (added assert ... is not None after get_job/retry_memo/reprocess_memo calls that return Optional[dict]).

typecheck.command: docker compose exec funasr bash -c 'cd /app/backend && ty check .'
typecheck.details: 1 deprecation warning (on_event in main.py, pre-existing). Fixed 45 not-subscriptable errors in test files by adding null-assertions after Optional-returning function calls.

lint.command: docker compose exec funasr bash -c 'cd /app/backend && ruff check . && ruff format --check . && cd /app/frontend && pnpm check && pnpm format:check'
lint.details: Ruff check passed, ruff format passed (33 files formatted), svelte-check found 0 errors and 0 warnings, Prettier passed.

appliedUpdates.description: Fixed 45 ty check diagnostics in test_jobs.py and test_reprocess.py by adding assert-is-not-None guards after calls to get_job(), retry_memo(), and reprocess_memo() which return Optional[dict].

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the singleton pattern used for GPU-bound services. The transcription service uses a module-level _models singleton with get_models()/is_model_ready() functions, which is appropriate for single-worker GPU serialization but differs from other services. Add a note in 'Coding Conventions > Backend (Python)' about when to use module-level singletons vs. other patterns.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m3-funasr-integration uses module-level _models singleton in transcription.py. Other services use get_connection() with try/finally. The pattern is appropriate for GPU model caching but not documented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the memo-action endpoint pattern: check memo exists → check job status guard → delegate to service function → return job response. This pattern is used consistently across retry_memo, reprocess_memo, and cancel endpoints in api/jobs.py and makes the API layer predictable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: backend/app/api/jobs.py — retry_memo (line 173) and reprocess_memo (line 216) follow identical structure. Same pattern as cancel endpoint.
